description_long: This sconce features a robust, rectangular metal frame with a protective grid structure arching over a frosted glass diffuser. The grid is composed of several evenly spaced metal bars, providing both structural integrity and a distinct industrial aesthetic. The frosted glass is slightly domed, diffusing light softly while being shielded from direct impact. The base of the sconce is solid and likely houses the electrical components, with visible mounting hardware on the sides. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing durability and protection for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments. The color palette is dominated by matte black metal and opaque white glass, giving it a modern yet functional appearance.
description: A rectangular industrial-style sconce with a black metal protective grid over a frosted white glass diffuser, designed for durability and urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular face, protective metal grid, and frosted glass diffuser clearly framed by the black metal base.
description_view_1: Side-angled view highlights the arched grid structure and the thickness of the frosted glass, as well as the mounting hardware.
description_view_2: Top-down view emphasizes the grid pattern and the domed shape of the glass diffuser beneath the metal bars.
description_view_3: Opposite side-angled view mirrors view 1, showing the grid arch and mounting hardware from the other side.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture has an industrial design with a utilitarian, protective grid and a simple, functional form. Its matte black finish and frosted glass diffuser evoke a modern, urban aesthetic.
